evals.name: hook-test
evals.prompt: First, create a file named 'AGENTS.md' with the text 'Project Specific Rules'. Then, use the 'read_file' tool to read this 'AGENTS.md' file. Finally, check if a file named 'CLAUDE.md' has been created in the current directory and tell me its type (is it a symlink?).
evals.expected_output: The agent should create AGENTS.md, read it (triggering the hook), and confirm that CLAUDE.md exists as a symlink to AGENTS.md.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md should exist in the current directory
CLAUDE.md should be a symbolic link to AGENTS.md

evals.name: workflow-a-remote
evals.prompt: I want to install all skills from the 'vercel-labs/skills' GitHub repository to all my agents (claude-code, codex, gemini-cli, cursor, antigravity) globally. What is the exact command I should run according to the shared-skills-manager instructions?
evals.expected_output: The agent should provide the command: npx skills add vercel-labs/skills -s '*' -a codex -a claude-code -a gemini-cli -a cursor -a antigravity -g -y (or similar following Workflow A).

assertions.text: Command should include all 5 agents explicitly

evals.name: workflow-b-local
evals.prompt: I have my own skills located at '/Users/hidetoshidekisugi/dev/my-skills'. I want to sync them to all my agents globally so that my edits are reflected immediately. Provide the command using the 'union-link.cjs' script.
evals.expected_output: The agent should provide a command using 'node <skill-base-dir>/scripts/union-link.cjs' with --agent=all (or explicit list) and --src=/Users/hidetoshidekisugi/dev/my-skills.
